results.transcript: Thanks for coming in. After reviewing your air lobe, there isn't any damage, there's just a lot of wax. I took out most of the chunks of wax with my instruments, now it's up to you to clean your ears, daily if you can, but every other day is fine as well, and then you can taper off to what you were normally doing.
